overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (GTA V) showing a character walking through a residential urban neighborhood at night. The character navigates sidewalks and crosses streets while encountering occasional pedestrians and vehicles under streetlight illumination.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential sidewalk with wrought iron fence

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to a wrought iron fence with brick pillars

entered.detail: black wrought iron fence with periodic brick pillars running along the left side of the sidewalk
grassy verge between the sidewalk and the iron fence
tall street lamp illuminating the sidewalk with warm light

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a residential sidewalk at night, bordered by a wrought iron fence on the left and a street on the right. Street lamps provide artificial illumination while trees partially obscure the night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential street intersection with stop marking

events.description: character steps off sidewalk and begins crossing the asphalt road toward the opposite side
character passes over the white stop sign painted on the road surface

agents.ego_description: crossing the street from left to right while heading toward the opposite sidewalk

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in light-colored clothing walking along the opposite sidewalk

entered.detail: octagonal stop sign on a pole at the corner of the intersection
large multi-story stone building with illuminated windows and an American flag

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the asphalt street, passing a stop sign and approaching a large historic stone building with an American flag. The scene opens up to full sky visibility as the character leaves the fenced sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential sidewalk with phone booth and bus stop

events.description: pedestrian density increases as character walks past multiple NPCs on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk passing other pedestrians and approaching a phone booth

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in brown coat walking same direction as ego
pedestrian in blue dress walking opposite direction

entered.detail: red and gray public telephone booth on the sidewalk
covered bus stop shelter with glass panels
multi-story modern building with illuminated windows in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the opposite sidewalk, passing multiple pedestrians including a person in a brown coat. A phone booth and bus shelter appear on the left while the historic stone building recedes into the background.

events.description: large military truck with headlights on passes by on the road to the right
character slows slightly while approaching the crosswalk at the intersection

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past a phone booth while a large truck passes on the adjacent road

notable_agents.action: military truck with canvas cover driving down the street from behind ego

entered.detail: white zebra crossing stripes painted on the road ahead

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking as a military truck passes on the right. The phone booth falls behind as the character approaches a crosswalk at the intersection, with modern buildings visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: street crosswalk returning to fenced sidewalk side

events.description: character steps onto crosswalk to return to the original sidewalk side with the iron fence
character steps back onto sidewalk next to the iron fence and hedge row

agents.ego_description: crossing the street back to the original side with the iron fence, following a pedestrian ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red top walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction

entered.detail: returning to the wrought iron fence with brick pillars on the left side
green hedge row running along the fence line

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the street back to the original side, returning to the sidewalk bordered by the iron fence and hedges. A pedestrian in a red top walks ahead as the character completes the crossing and continues along the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a quiet residential neighborhood at night that transitions from a secluded sidewalk to a busier urban intersection and back. It begins with the character walking along a sidewalk bordered by a wrought iron fence under the artificial glow of street lamps and overhanging trees. As the character leaves the fence to cross the asphalt street, the view opens up to the full night sky and passes a stop sign toward a large historic stone building with an American flag. The scene then shifts to the opposite sidewalk, passing a phone booth, a bus shelter, and several pedestrians before a military truck rolls past on the right. Finally, the camera follows the character across a distant intersection and back to the original side of the street, returning to the path of hedges and iron fencing as a pedestrian in a red top walks ahead.
